//: Config for the outward-action gate (engine/eval/hooks/outbound_gate.py). KTD8: the outward tool set is data, not code — add a connector's mutating tools here, no code change. VERIFY-AT-BUILD (connectors.md KTD-7): confirm exact MCP tool names against the installed connector versions; a missing pattern silently un-gates a tool, so the gate fails closed if THIS file is unreadable/malformed.
//outward: Mutating / communicating verbs only. Read verbs (list_/get_/search_/read_) are intentionally absent so they pass untouched (R6). Labels and Gmail create_draft are treated INWARD (private, reversible, not sent) and deliberately left ungated.
//levels: Autonomy levels (config.md autonomy.level) at which the gate will execute a matched approved proposal. propose-only (default) and any unrecognized value DENY — the agent never acts outward; the principal sends. See INSTRUCTIONS.md §8.
